title: How a Man of God Waits Without Drifting
caption:
The man chasing God doesn't look desperate.

He just becomes the man worth finding.

There's a version of self-improvement that's still just performance — get ripped, get rich, get her. That's building a resume, not a man. The work that actually transforms you is done for one audience: Christ.

And the wait is not a gap in your story. It is the story. Joseph didn't become the right man for the moment in the palace — he became him in the pit and the prison.

"Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33.

The man who needs nothing from her can give everything to her.

—

Save this for the brother still looking.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #discipline #scripture #thevision #christianity
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
